inputs.label: Initial Pressure (P₁)
inputs.businessContext: Initial absolute pressure of the gas. Enter 0 if unknown.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial absolute pressure of the gas. Enter 0 if unknown.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gazın başlangıç mutlak basıncı. Bilinmiyorsa 0 girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anfangsabsolutdruck des Gases. Geben Sie 0 ein, falls unbekannt.

inputs.label: Initial Temperature (T₁)
inputs.businessContext: Initial absolute temperature of the gas. Enter 0 if unknown.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial absolute temperature of the gas. Enter 0 if unknown.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gazın başlangıç mutlak sıcaklığı. Bilinmiyorsa 0 girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anfangsabsoluttemperatur des Gases. Geben Sie 0 ein, falls unbekannt.

inputs.label: Final Pressure (P₂)
inputs.businessContext: Final absolute pressure of the gas. Enter 0 if unknown.

businessContext_i18n.en: Final absolute pressure of the gas. Enter 0 if unknown.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gazın son mutlak basıncı. Bilinmiyorsa 0 girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Endgültiger absoluter Druck des Gases. 0 eingeben, falls unbekannt.

inputs.label: Final Temperature (T₂)
inputs.businessContext: Final absolute temperature of the gas. Enter 0 if unknown.

businessContext_i18n.en: Final absolute temperature of the gas. Enter 0 if unknown.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gazın son mutlak sıcaklığı. Bilinmiyorsa 0 girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Endgültige absolute Temperatur des Gases. 0 eingeben, falls unbekannt.

breakdown: Gay-Lussac Law: P₁/T₁ = P₂/T₂ (constant volume and mass)
Substitute known values and solve for the unknown.
If you are solving for P₁: P₁ = P₂ * T₁ / T₂
If solving for T₁: T₁ = P₁ * T₂ / P₂
If solving for P₂: P₂ = P₁ * T₂ / T₁
If solving for T₂: T₂ = P₂ * T₁ / P₁
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
